preferences.text: User prefers concise Chinese progress updates while iterating on product ideas.
preferences.evidence: User collaborates in Chinese and asks for concrete progress.

project.name: Chat Memory Demo
project.objective: Demonstrate user preference transfer and side topic recovery in ordinary AI chat.

active.text: Design memory behavior for ordinary AI chat.

closed_recently.evidence: Side question appeared during memory product design.

episodes.text: User asked whether agent memory should be a skill, a library, or both.
episodes.evidence: Side question appeared during memory product design.

migration.summary: The demo stores a durable user preference, tracks an active chat topic, captures a side question as an episode, then resumes the main topic.
next_actions: Continue the main topic without asking the user to reconstruct context.
risks: Do not turn one side question into a permanent preference without evidence.
